subject: can't import tilt series from IMOD
body:
Hi All,

I have been able to follow the Warp tutorial to the point where the 
tomostar files are created based on IMOD alignment:

-  I import the tilt series and alignment information to Warp

- I see the tick box appearing, indicating that alignment was found from 
the IMOD folders.

- The Tomostar files are created and they point to raw frames that are in 
the same directory.  

However, nothing happens when I click start processing (the circle 
indicating the number of items to process does not appear).

Any idea why this could happen and what should I do next?

best wishes,

Juha
